docs.title: Welcome to MkDocs 中文字形測試
Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: 系統測試與排版展示
docs.text: 這是一段測試用的文字。夫天地者萬物之逆旅，光陰者百代之過客。而浮生若夢，為歡幾何。古人秉燭夜遊，良有以也。

docs.title: 圖片測試
docs.text: 以下載入一張來自外部圖庫的隨機圖片測試渲染效果：

docs.title: 數學公式測試 (LaTeX)
docs.text:
這裡測試行內公式 \(E = mc^2\) 以及獨立區塊的矩陣公式。在處理此類運算時，通常包含 \(m\) 列 (row) 與 \(n\) 行或欄 (column) 的矩陣相乘：

\[ \begin{pmatrix} a_{11} & a_{12} \\ a_{21} & a_{22} \end{pmatrix} \begin{pmatrix} x_1 \\ x_2 \end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix} b_1 \\ b_2 \end{pmatrix} \] \[ \nabla \times \mathbf{E} = -\frac{\partial \mathbf{B}}{\partial t} \]

docs.title: 程式碼區塊測試 (Python)
docs.text:
以下為 Python 語法高亮與結構測試：

import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def compute_field(grid_x, grid_y, k):
    return np.sin(k * grid_x) * np.cos(k * grid_y)

class FieldSimulator:
    def __init__(self, size):
        self.size = size

    def generate_grid(self):
        x = np.linspace(-5, 5, self.size)
        y = np.linspace(-5, 5, self.size)
        return np.meshgrid(x, y)

GRID_SIZE = 500
WAVE_NUMBER = 2.0

if __name__ == "__main__":
    simulator = FieldSimulator(GRID_SIZE)
    X, Y = simulator.generate_grid()

    Z = compute_field(X, Y, WAVE_NUMBER)

    plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
    plt.contourf(X, Y, Z, cmap='viridis')
    plt.colorbar()
    plt.show()
